strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems, including micro-services handling millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic — directly relevant to the CTO's distributed-systems and real-time inference demands.

Current hands-on work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows, plus prior fintech exposure at RIDE Capital reshaping German investment practices — a rare combined agentic-AI + fintech signal.

Founder of GISCollective, an event-driven platform deployed on Kubernetes, paired with strong engineering-culture credentials (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course author) — exactly the discipline and rapid-shipping mindset the role demands.
concerns: Title trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior IC; no explicit CTO, VP Eng, or Head-of-Engineering tenure listed.
No quantified record of scaling an engineering org from 10 to 30+ people or developing a senior leadership layer beneath them.
Multi-agent AI work described at framework/tooling level rather than as productionized, regulated, high-stakes trade-decisioning systems.

key_factors.factor: Hands-on agentic AI + MCP framework experience
Fintech exposure combined with software-craftsmanship leadership

response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare three-way overlap the role explicitly asks for: current production work on agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, proven distributed-systems chops from Dunnhumby/Sociomantic's millions-of-requests-per-second micro-services backbone, and direct fintech context from RIDE Capital's investment platform. Layered on top is a founder track record (GISCollective on Kubernetes, event-driven architecture), polyglot pragmatism across TypeScript/Node, DLang, and lower-level systems, and a deeply embedded craftsmanship culture — TDD, trunk-based delivery, CI/CD, plus a public history of teaching and elevating others through workshops, dojos, and courses. That blend of agentic depth, real-time systems scale, fintech familiarity, and culture-building leverage reads as strong upside for a scale-up CTO seat focused on disciplined shipping and AI-native fintech.
